age_signals.raw_text: Baby and toddler board book; from about 0 months shared reading

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A sturdy Dear Zoo board book with big animal flaps to lift, sized for shared looking when babble and pointing start to join the page on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Talk stretches past coos now, and animal flaps give a clear pause plus a reveal to name together. Keep turns short on the sofa so the book stays a chat, not a chew marathon. Stop while the look still feels friendly and close the covers.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Shared looking and early chat at 4-6m.
top_picks.gift_note: Good gift if library copy not already loved.
top_picks.ownership_note: Families often own several board books already - ask first.
top_picks.safety_notes: Awake shared reading only; not for the cot.

key_specs.included_items: Seat shell (legs and tray sold separately)

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: The IKEA ANTILOP highchair seat shell, completed with separate legs and tray, giving a simple wipe-clean seat once sitting without help is reliable.
top_picks.ember_verdict: First tastes are getting close, but the chair only belongs when sitting is steady without help. ANTILOP keeps cleanup honest for porridge experiments. Budget for legs and tray as well as the shell on the same trip so you leave with a usable seat.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Simple supportive seat for early meals.
top_picks.gift_note: Parent buy.
top_picks.ownership_note: One highchair usually enough.
top_picks.safety_notes: Only once sitting unaided; harness on; never leave alone.
top_picks.rating_source: UK parent review aggregates for ANTILOP
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1: only fully verified buyable UK highchair primary on research day; overlaps band at sitting stage.
top_picks.evidence_notes: IKEA shell+tray buyable 2026-07-24. Legs sold separately - buy as a set.

top_picks.product_name: Lamaze Gardenbug Foot Finder and Wrist Rattle Set

age_signals.raw_text: 0–12 months

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Lamaze Gardenbug set with soft classic foot finder socks and Velcro wrist rattles that jingle when legs and arms move during supervised floor play.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Kicks start making noise on purpose at this age. Soft bug socks stay put so a flail becomes a rattle without needing a precise grab yet. Use on the playmat during nappy changes when feet are already in the air and you can watch the whole time.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Cause-and-effect via kicking.
top_picks.caveats: Socks can slip off bigger calves; never for sleep.
top_picks.gift_note: Popular gift — still useful at 4–6m.
top_picks.ownership_note: Often already owned from newborn gifts.
top_picks.safety_notes: Supervised awake play only; remove for sleep.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1: clearest dedicated foot-finder sock design with deep UK familiarity.

top_picks.ember_verdict: Body words land best when you touch the real tummy while the flap lifts. Keep it a giggle game on the changing mat, not a quiz. One or two flaps is enough; stop while smiles are still easy and put the book aside.

age_signals.raw_text: 0–12 months

categories.cluster_label: The floor is my little gym

qa_summary.notes: Mode A 2026-07-24; Amazon/JL/Boots often bot-walled — primaries on brand/Hamleys/Penguin/LoveReading/IKEA/Coolshop.

age_signals.raw_text: 0–12 months+

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A washable organic cotton floor gym with a wooden frame, hanging toys and a play guide that moves from short tummy spells into reaching and rolling on the living room floor.
top_picks.ember_verdict: By four to six months the floor becomes a proper workout space, not a quick stretch on a towel. This gym keeps tummy time interesting with reachables that change as rolling starts. The washable mat survives milk dribbles without turning the room into a plastic play zone for every awake spell.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Longer tummy sessions plus intentional reaching as rolling begins.
top_picks.caveats: Premium; one gym is usually enough.
top_picks.gift_note: Big first-year gift - check they lack a large gym.
top_picks.ownership_note: High ownership risk if a gym already lives downstairs.
top_picks.rating_source: Lovevery UK / multi-retailer aggregates (spot-check live count)
top_picks.review_quality_note: Large review base; founder may confirm UK-only count.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: stage toys and guide match the 4-6m shift into longer tummy and reaching better than a plain wipe-clean mat alone.
top_picks.description: A washable organic cotton floor gym with a wooden frame, hanging toys and a play guide that moves from short tummy spells into reaching and rolling on the living room floor.

This gym keeps tummy time interesting with reachables that change as rolling starts. The washable mat survives milk dribbles without turning the room into a plastic play zone for every awake spell.

age_signals.raw_text: Safe and certified for newborns

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A reversible Totter and Tumble floor mat with a soft cushioned core and a wipe-clean surface, sized so you can sit beside them for longer tummy sessions without hard boards underneath.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Once tummy time lasts more than a minute, cold floors punish elbows and knees. A wipe-clean cushioned mat lets you join them on the floor without a giant foam puzzle. Reversible faces keep it looking intentional when visitors walk through after lunch on a busy day.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Clean supportive surface for floor-as-gym without arches.
top_picks.gift_note: Stylish long-life mat gift.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if a thick wipe-clean mat already covers the main zone.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2 over #3: sealed wipe-clean foam beats puzzle tiles for milk-and-dribble floor play.
top_picks.description: A reversible Totter and Tumble floor mat with a soft cushioned core and a wipe-clean surface, sized so you can sit beside them for longer tummy sessions without hard boards underneath.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A thick non-toxic EVA foam puzzle playmat in a simple cream rainbow design, so you can build a soft patch on hard floors and pull tiles apart after spills.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Hard tiles punish longer tummy spells once they push up and rock. Puzzle foam softens the floor without covering the whole room in one roll. Pull one tile aside after a spill and the rest of the patch stays ready for the next try on the same afternoon.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Modular padding for smaller homes.
top_picks.gift_note: Practical gift for hard-floor flats.
top_picks.ownership_note: Avoid a second foam set if tiles already cover the corner.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Plain Playmat Set in Navy, Sage and Cream
top_picks.rank_rationale: #3 over #4: patterned starter set is clearer for first-time buyers than plain tiles alone.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Gus and Beau plain EVA foam tile set in navy, sage and cream that expands with extra tiles, giving a soft patch for tummy time on hard floors without busy prints.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Busy prints can feel loud once the mat stays down all day. Plain tiles keep the floor soft while the room still looks like a living room. Add tiles later if rolling turns into crawling and the soft patch needs to grow with them.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Calmer look for open-plan rooms.
top_picks.caveats: Plain tiles may not join patterned sets.
top_picks.gift_note: Good if they want quiet colours.
top_picks.ownership_note: Do not buy alongside Rainbow unless expanding deliberately.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #4 over #5: expandable plain tiles suit growing floor use better than a second one-piece Totter colourway.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Brand primary buyable 2026-07-24. Gus capped at two Top Picks.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Totter and Tumble Ludo reversible wipe-clean playmat with the same soft cushion as Mariner, offered in a different double sided print for the main floor zone.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some parents want the Totter wipe-clean feel but not the Mariner colours. Ludo keeps the same cushion for longer tummy sessions as rolling starts. Pick one Totter mat only; two large mats in the same home usually just fight for floor space.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Print choice within a proven wipe-clean mat.
top_picks.gift_note: Only if they lack a Totter mat.
top_picks.ownership_note: High duplication risk with Mariner.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5: second Totter colourway for print-led buyers; ranked last because Mariner already covers the wipe-clean case.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Brand primary buyable 2026-07-24. Totter capped at two Top Picks.
